issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across post-referral, pre-referral, and sale pending workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of halting enrollment. The workflow lacked proper exit or suppression filters for Closed Lost and Transferred deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks that were incorrectly generated after a deal was marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow did not re-enroll deals that previously exited and returned to Offer Accepted stage
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then flipped back to an earlier stage, and then set to Offer Accepted again, the workflow tasks for collecting closing info did not re-trigger. The root cause was that deal stage Offer Accepted was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the workflow to add Offer Accepted as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were re-set to Offer Accepted during the impact window but did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the old loan officer rather than the newly assigned one. The affected deal showed the prior LO (Paul) instead of the updated LO (Julie Yocum) in agent-facing emails. Luis investigated and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend any automated emails that went out with the incorrect loan officer name.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted stage were not triggering TC workflow enrollment, meaning TCs were not receiving their associated closing tasks. The issue affected deals with no lender assigned, though the exact root cause was not confirmed publicly. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and reported the issue was fixed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.
